title: Aftershock
summary:
Main
With so much short-term uncertainty surrounding the Middle East War, most are focused on the near-term implications. However, the conflict will have lasting impacts, forcing many countries to reevaluate their attitudes towards energy security in terms of free trade and sourcing of essential commodities, alongside domestic energy production and the fuel mix which powers their economies. Yet in a less extreme sense, we have been here before with the Russia-Ukraine War.
